# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the
[Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/),
version 2.1.

We are committed to providing a welcoming and harassment-free experience for
everyone. Examples of unacceptable behavior and enforcement responsibilities are
described in the Contributor Covenant linked above.

## Reporting

Report unacceptable behavior privately to the maintainers via
[GitHub Security Advisories](../../security/advisories/new) or the contact listed
in `SUPPORT.md`. All reports will be reviewed and investigated promptly and
fairly.
